INTRVNS_MDCTN_OTHR_DSCHRG_CD Other: IV - Other (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving other IV medications. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
607 TRNSFSN_ADMSN_CD TRNSFSN_ADMSN_CD Other: Transfusions (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving transfusions. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
608 TRNSFSN_DSCHRG_CD TRNSFSN_DSCHRG_CD Other:
